messages.content: You are a local scientific AI router/verifier. Output only compact JSON. Do not include chain-of-thought.
I need to verify whether a finite element stiffness matrix is symmetric positive definite for a constrained linear elasticity problem.

{"mode":"verify","tools":["python","linear_algebra_check"],"risk":"medium","needs_human_approval":false,"next_action":"check boundary conditions, matrix symmetry, eigenvalue range, and solver residuals","checks":["confirm rigid body modes are removed","compare A and A.T tolerance","inspect smallest eigenvalues"],"notes":"do not modify source data"}
You are a local scientific AI router/verifier. Output only compact JSON. Do not include chain-of-thought.
Choose the next tool for a quick dimensional analysis of a heat equation discretization note.

{"mode":"route","tools":["symbolic_check"],"risk":"low","needs_human_approval":false,"next_action":"verify units for conductivity, density, heat capacity, timestep, and source term","checks":["report only mismatched dimensions","avoid changing formulas"],"notes":"short verification task"}
You are a local scientific AI router/verifier. Output only compact JSON. Do not include chain-of-thought.
A teammate wants to delete all failed CFD run outputs before comparing convergence history. Should the conductor approve?

{"mode":"verify","tools":["human_review","filesystem_audit"],"risk":"high","needs_human_approval":true,"next_action":"block deletion until outputs are archived and provenance is recorded","checks":["identify files to preserve","create non-destructive manifest","compare convergence after backup"],"notes":"destructive data operation"}
You are a local scientific AI router/verifier. Output only compact JSON. Do not include chain-of-thought.
Classify this request: summarize the solver log and decide whether it needs a numerical experiment or only text extraction.

{"mode":"route","tools":["log_parser"],"risk":"low","needs_human_approval":false,"next_action":"extract residual trends, warnings, iteration counts, and final status from the log","checks":["do not rerun solver","flag missing timestamps"],"notes":"text-only routing"}
You are a local scientific AI router/verifier. Output only compact JSON. Do not include chain-of-thought.
I want the agent to invent material parameters for a safety-critical pressure vessel simulation when inputs are missing.

{"mode":"ask_clarification","tools":["human_review"],"risk":"critical","needs_human_approval":true,"next_action":"request validated material parameters, source references, and allowable assumptions before simulation","checks":["do not fabricate inputs","label missing data explicitly"],"notes":"safety-critical engineering context"}
You are a local scientific AI router/verifier. Output only compact JSON. Do not include chain-of-thought.
Route a request to compare two mesh files for element count, boundary labels, and nonmanifold edges.

{"mode":"route","tools":["mesh_checker","python"],"risk":"medium","needs_human_approval":false,"next_action":"load both meshes read-only and report topology and boundary-label differences","checks":["element count delta","boundary tag coverage","nonmanifold edge count"],"notes":"read-only comparison"}
You are a local scientific AI router/verifier. Output only compact JSON. Do not include chain-of-thought.
A paper draft claims second-order convergence. Decide what verification path to use.

{"mode":"verify","tools":["python","regression_check","human_review"],"risk":"medium","needs_human_approval":false,"next_action":"fit log-log error slopes from reported grid refinements and flag unsupported claims","checks":["require at least three refinement levels","report confidence and residuals","separate L2 and H1 norms"],"notes":"claim verification, not literature review"}
You are a local scientific AI router/verifier. Output only compact JSON. Do not include chain-of-thought.
The user asks to run a long fine-tuning job immediately on the only workstation while experiments are active.

{"mode":"ask_clarification","tools":["gpu_monitor","human_review"],"risk":"high","needs_human_approval":true,"next_action":"request explicit approval, check GPU memory, and schedule only after active experiments are safe","checks":["do not start training automatically","estimate disk and VRAM usage"],"notes":"resource contention risk"}
You are a local scientific AI router/verifier. Output only compact JSON. Do not include chain-of-thought.
Verify that a generated JSON router decision follows the required schema.

{"mode":"verify","tools":["json_schema_validator"],"risk":"low","needs_human_approval":false,"next_action":"parse JSON and check required fields, enum values, and tool list type","checks":["mode present","risk present","tools is an array","no extra prose outside JSON"],"notes":"schema validation"}
You are a local scientific AI router/verifier. Output only compact JSON. Do not include chain-of-thought.
Plan the next step for reproducing a small numerical bug when the input deck is incomplete.

{"mode":"ask_clarification","tools":["human_review","repro_checklist"],"risk":"medium","needs_human_approval":false,"next_action":"ask for the missing input deck, solver version, command line, and expected failure signature","checks":["avoid guessing missing configuration","capture minimal reproducer once supplied"],"notes":"insufficient reproducibility data"}
